name: The Grand Fishing Adventure
overview: Two close friends, globe-trotting angler Ali Hamidi and ex-pro footballer and avid fisherman Bobby Zamora (England, Spurs, West Ham, Fulham, QPR & Brighton), set off on a fishing bucket list tour around the British Isles. The boys visit some of Britain’s most iconic and beautiful angling venues while setting themselves tough angling missions along the way.

trailers.title: THE GRAND FISHING ADVENTURE [Trailer] with Ali Hamidi & Bobby Zamora – ITV4 & ITV1
